title: dev-flow: Beads Integration + Superpowers Fork Independence
summary: Comprehensive restructuring of dev-flow plugin integrating beads-first execution discipline, ADR capture subsystem, review gates, and lifting holomush workflow skills with new conventions.
notes: Document contains ADR-style frontmatter (Status: Proposed, Deciders) but content is technical specification: Rules 1-7 define structural requirements, extensive API/interface contracts, workflow phases with verification steps, and implementation architecture. Path in /specs/ directory confirms SPEC classification. Classification favors content structure over status field.
